programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the murder of a young opera singer.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The ambitious inventor of an electric vehicle.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch investigates the abduction of Lucille Messing, a shy, churchgoing librarian.

programme.title: Big Wedding, The
programme.desc: A long-divorced couple fakes being married as their family unites for a wedding.

programme.title: I Feel Pretty
programme.desc: A woman struggling with insecurity wakes from a fall believing she is the most beautiful woman on the planet.

programme.title: Long Shot
programme.desc: A journalist reunites with his childhood crush, now one of the most influential women in the world.

programme.title: Friends With Kids
programme.desc: Two best friends decide to have a child together while keeping their relationship platonic.

programme.title: Killing Season
programme.desc: Oscar winner Robert De Niro ("Raging Bull") and Oscar nominee John Travolta ("Pulp Fiction") star as two Bosnian War veterans hunting each other in this thrilling game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Honest Thief
programme.desc: Wanting to lead an honest life, a notorious bank robber (Liam Neeson) turns himself in, only to be double-crossed by two ruthless FBI agents.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: As a mercenary, John Seeger (Steven Seagal) has a reputation that precedes him. That's why he's being blackmailed into performing a risky job: breaking the son of a wealthy arms dealer out of a South African prison. With his friends taken hostage, Seeger agrees to do the deed -- but finds out too late that he's been double-crossed. Not one who likes being taken for a fool, Seeger hatches an elaborate plan to get even that will make the prison break look like capture the flag.

programme.title: Blitz
programme.desc: Jason Statham stars as a tough cop who's dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers. Also featuring Paddy Considine and Aidan Gillen.

programme.title: All I See Is You [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Gina is a beautiful young woman who's still haunted by the accident that took her sight years earlier. Living in Bangkok with her husband, James, she undergoes a cutting-edge operation that restores the vision to her right eye. Now that Gina can see again, she slowly starts to realize that her newfound independence makes James feel jealous, threatened and insecure.

programme.title: Arlington Road
programme.desc: Man begins to suspect his neighbors are not what they appear to be and their secrets could be deadly

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: Set in Future LA at Nurse runs a secret emergency room for criminals.

programme.title: Killer Elite
programme.desc: When his mentor is taken captive by a disgraced Arab sheik, a killer-for-hire is forced into action. His mission: kill three members of Britain's elite Special Air Service responsible for his son's deaths.

programme.title: Before the Devil Knows You're Dead
programme.desc: When two brothers organize the robbery of their parents' jewelry store the job goes horribly wrong, triggering a series of events that sends them, their father and one brother's wife barreling towards a shattering climax.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Factory worker Douglas Quaid visits a company that can turn dreams into real memories. Thinking that memories of life as a superspy are just the ticket, Quaid undergoes the procedure. When something goes wrong, he must team up with a rebel fighter on a search to find the head of the underground resistance and take down the leader of the free world.

programme.title: Seven Pounds
programme.desc: A strange IRS agent uses his database to locate a series of needy people and goes to elaborate lengths to improve their lives. During the process, he falls in love with a woman in need of a new heart. It s only after he s killed himself and everyone s benefitted from his generosity that we learn who he really was and why he did what he did.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: The Waterdance
programme.desc: A young man learns how to come to terms with his disability after becoming paralyzed in a hiking accident.

programme.title: Easy Rider
programme.desc: A landmark road film, EASY RIDER chronicles the search for freedom by two motorcycle-riding drifters (Peter Fonda and Dennis Hopper) who meet up with alcoholic lawyer, Jack Nicholson in a southern jail. Nicholson gets them out and then joins them on their liberating journey.

programme.title: The Fuller Brush Man
programme.desc: A door-to-door salesman (Red Skelton) gets mixed up in murder.

programme.title: What A Woman
programme.desc: A powerful agent's search for a movie's leading man sends her to a handsome, but dull, author.

programme.title: Three On A Couch
programme.desc: In order to convince his psyhiatrist-fiance to marry him and honeymoon in Paris a man must don various disguises to help cure three of her women patients.

programme.title: Our Wife
programme.desc: A self-pitying, drunken composer finds inspiration in a new woman only to have his ex-wife decide that she now wants him back.

programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: It's the late 1980s, when Wall Street is riding high, and it seems as if the entire country is cashing in on the bumper profits. Disgusted with the materialism that surrounds him, Matt Franklin, a brilliant young MIT graduate, has walked out on his well-paid position at a local lab and taken a low-level job as a video clerk, much to his father Bill's consternation. And the crises keep piling up in Matt's life. His best buddy Barry has just gotten fired from his job, his brainy sister Wendy is getting hitched to her vapid boyfriend Kyle, and the gorgeous Tori Frederking, long-time object of Matt's unattainable adoration, is suddenly back in the picture. Now, on one wild, woolly and irresponsible evening, everything is coming to a head, with explosive results.

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Seven mercenaries are recruited from throughout the galaxy to save a peaceful planet from the threat of an evil tyrant bent on dominating the entire universe. Among them are a lizard-like humanoid, a space cowboy, a female warrior and a brooding killer-for-hire.

programme.title: Before I Fall
programme.desc: Sam seems to have everything a teenage girl could want: popularity, a hot boyfriend, cool status, fun friends and a loving family. But beyond the superficial, Sam’s life isn’t so charmed. She is one of a clique of high school mean girls who make life hell for those who are different. When Sam is killed in a car accident, she is forced to relive her last day on Earth in order to get things right.

programme.title: Justin Bieber's Believe
programme.desc: Experience Justin Bieber's real story in this compelling documentary featuring thrilling never-before-seen concert footage, behind-the-scenes access and special appearances.

programme.title: Jane Got A Gun
programme.desc: A woman asks her ex-lover for help in order to save her outlaw husband from a gang out to kill him.

programme.title: Robin Hood
programme.desc: An action-packed retelling of the classic legend, filled with thrilling battle sequences and epic adventure.

programme.title: Empire State
programme.desc: Two childhood friends plan to rob an armored-car depository, but an NYPD officer stands in their way.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Taylor Lautner stars in a pulse-pounding action heist film set in the world of parkour.

programme.title: Pursuit
programme.desc: A troubled cop hunts for a ruthless hacker, who’s committing violence as he searches for his kidnapped wife.

programme.title: Acts of Vengeance
programme.desc: A lawyer takes a vow of silence, not to be broken until he finds out who killed his wife and daughter.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Reawakening
programme.desc: John and Mary have lived in grief for ten years because their child, Clare, disappeared when she was fourteen. When Clare mysteriously returns, John suspects she's not who she claims to be, plunging the couple into a search for the truth.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark
programme.desc: A group of virtual hunters unleash a deadly shark in a Texas lake, causing a young couple to fight for their lives during a peaceful fishing trip in a secluded cove.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: The Final Master
programme.desc: With help from his apprentice (Song Yang), a Wing Chun practitioner (Liao Fan) must defeat eight martial arts academies before he can open his own school.

programme.title: Vengeance of an Assassin
programme.desc: An assassin escapes a battle and hides out in his childhood home. As he recovers, he realizes he has to fight faster and harder to survive.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: Jodi Arias: Dirty Little Secret
programme.desc: Based on the disturbing murder trial that has captivated the nation.

programme.title: My Family's Killer Affairs
programme.desc: Nikki is shocked to meet Jenell, the daughter she never knew.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Casey Anthony's former jail mate reveals how the two forged a deep friendship.

programme.title: My Husband's Killer Affair
programme.desc: Michelle hires a nanny, but has no idea the danger that she has put her family in.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 1
programme.desc: Prominent Lawyer Alex Murdaugh's family's hidden crimes begin piling up.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: Alex Murdaugh called police and reported his wife Maggie and son Paul dead.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Hired to rebrand a radio show, Savannah finds herself falling in love after working with the host.

programme.title: The Wedding Arrangement
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a botanist and a nature photographer as they prepare flower arrangements for a wedding.

programme.title: Pursued
programme.desc: A fast rising hi tech executive must protect his career and family from the ruthless tactics of a homicidal corporate headhunter.

programme.title: Cradle of Lies
programme.desc: Marissa was in a coma while pregnant and wakes up five years later to find that the baby she delivered is gone

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: Take Back
programme.desc: Zara (Gillian White) and Brian (Michael Jai White) are living the perfect small town life when a mysterious stranger from Zara's secret past kidnaps their daughter and now they must race to save her life.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: The Loyalty Test
programme.desc: Trey Harrison is an up-and-coming internet star that has created a series exposing cheaters in orchestrated sting operations, successfully turning heartbreak into a viral spectacle. But when two participants are found murdered, Trey’s world begins to crumble and things only begin to escalate.

programme.title: Murder on the Pole
programme.desc: One night Bunny was the queen of the dance floor; the next, she was a chalk outline. Dismissed by a department eager to sweep a "club girl's" death under the rug, Lola refuses to let her sister’s killer walk free. To find the murderer, Lola must infiltrate the world that claimed Bunny’s life—a world of predatory regulars, backstage betrayals, and a cover-up that goes higher than she ever imagined.

programme.title: My Man
programme.desc: Trina, a young model, becomes entangled with the charming Max. As their relationship deepens, she uncovers his dark secrets: a double life, a psychotic ex-girlfriend, and a dangerous obsession. When Trina crosses a line, she becomes the target of a deadly game of cat and mouse. Betrayal, madness, and murder ensue as the lines between love, obsession, and survival blur.

programme.title: It Is What it is
programme.desc: Victoria, a sophisticated young woman, is trying to find happiness with a good man in the midst of drugs and violence in the mean streets of KC.

programme.title: Killer Baby Mama
programme.desc: Calvin and Erica's tumultuous relationship takes a turn when Erica discovers she's pregnant. Unhappy with the news, Calvin decides to break up with her, moving on to date Candace. Meanwhile, Erica befriends Calvin's sick mother to gather information about his new relationship. Tragedy strikes as Candace is found murdered, and Calvin becomes a suspect. To add to his troubles, he learns that Erica manipulated his mother into changing her will.

programme.title: Mega Shark vs Giant Octopus
programme.desc: The California coast is terrorized by two enormous prehistoric sea creatures.

programme.title: 3 Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: The world's greatest killing machine is three times as deadly when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship.

programme.title: Ice Sharks
programme.desc: As scientists study the effects of climate change on sea life, a new breed of shark breaks through.

programme.title: Megalodon: The Frenzy
programme.desc: A “frenzy” of five Megalodons - spawn of the original - terrorizes the open ocean.

programme.title: Bermuda Tentacles
programme.desc: When Air Force One crashes in the Bermuda Triangle, a Navy rescue team awakens a deadly creature.

programme.title: Blood Lake
programme.desc: Thousands of carnivorous fish attack citizens of a sleepy lake town, leaving them scrambling to stay alive.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: After a forced evacuation of the island by the military, tragedy strikes many of the inhabitants and their families as they try to avoid detention.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Growing up with addicts for parents, Abigail's only solace is an odd porcelain doll named Betsy. Only Betsy isn't like most dolls

programme.title: The Trouble With Tessa
programme.desc: Tessas suspicion that someone has been listening in on them gets confirmed. They launch a quiet investigation of their own, hoping to prove what theyre starting to fear. Their search leads to an unexpectedand increasingly personaltarget. When a set of missing car keys pushes Tessa to act, they make the dangerous choice to recover whats theirs. But what starts as a covert retrieval quickly spirals into something more ominous, as Tessa uncovers unsettling signs that someone in town may be hiding much more than stolen property. Before they can make sense of what theyve found, they find themselves trapped in a place not meant to be foundand certainly not meant to be escaped.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: After Evelin confesses her pregnancy, she is found to be resistant to the virus, which leads her to a mainland hospital and a shocking discovery.

programme.title: The Island
programme.desc: After a forced evacuation of the island by the military, tragedy strikes many of the inhabitants and their families as they try to avoid detention.

programme.title: Tales From The Void
programme.desc: Growing up with addicts for parents, Abigail's only solace is an odd porcelain doll named Betsy. Only Betsy isn't like most dolls

programme.title: The Trouble With Tessa
programme.desc: Tessas suspicion that someone has been listening in on them gets confirmed. They launch a quiet investigation of their own, hoping to prove what theyre starting to fear. Their search leads to an unexpectedand increasingly personaltarget. When a set of missing car keys pushes Tessa to act, they make the dangerous choice to recover whats theirs. But what starts as a covert retrieval quickly spirals into something more ominous, as Tessa uncovers unsettling signs that someone in town may be hiding much more than stolen property. Before they can make sense of what theyve found, they find themselves trapped in a place not meant to be foundand certainly not meant to be escaped.

programme.title: The Changeling
programme.desc: After the death of his wife and daughter in a car crash, a music professor staying at a long-vacant Seattle mansion is dragged into a decades-old mystery by an inexplicable presence in the mansion's attic.

programme.title: The Strings
programme.desc: In the dead of winter, a musician travels to a remote cottage to work on new material, but soon finds herself under attack from a mysterious dark presence.

programme.title: A Dark Song
programme.desc: A heartbroken woman and recluse occultist perform an ancient, dark ritual to bring her child back to life - but missteps have consequences and unknown evils are unleashed.

programme.title: The Nightshifter
programme.desc: Stênio works the graveyard shift in the morgue of a vast, violent city. Each night he prepares the lifeless corpses for examination, but he's never alone. For Stênio can talk to the dead...

programme.title: Housemaid, The (2018)
programme.desc: On a plantation in 1953 Indochina, a troubled young housemaid finds comfort in the arms of the widowed owner, until his deceased wife returns to object.

programme.title: Consecration
programme.desc: After her brother dies under strange circumstances, Grace travels to the Mount Saviour Convent for answers. Once there, she uncovers murder, sacrilege, and a shocking truth about her past.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Home for Christmas" - Jed, Ellie May, Jethro and Granny take their first plane flight back home for Christmas to visit cousin Pearl, who is busy cooking up a feast to win Mr. Brewster's unwilling heart.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Great Feud" - Granny and the rest of the Clampetts start a feud with the Drysdales since Sonny courted Elly May and then stood her up when granny suggested marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Races Jetherine" - When Sonny Drysdale promises to give Elly May a ring, Granny thinks he's going to propose and becomes a matchmaker. Cousin Pearl can't stand the idea that Elly May will get married before Jethrine, so she sets to matchmaking Jethrine with Jasper Depew.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Pygmalion and Elly" - Sonny Drysdale decides he needs to be Pygmalion to Elly's Galatea and remake her from a hillbilly into a woman of society, while Granny uses love charms to heat up their relationship.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly's First Date" - Mr. Drysdale convinces his self-absorbed stepson Sonny to date Elly May to Mrs. Drysdale's consternation, while Granny and Jed make preparations for Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro Goes to School" - Jed enrolls Jethro at an exclusive Beverly Hills elementary school. Millicent Schuyler-Potts, the proprietor of the school, is aghast when Jed and Jethro show up, convinced this is part of some ghastly hoax. After Jed says that banker Milburn Drysdale is his neighbor, she calls the banker. It turns out that Drysdale's bank holds the mortgage on the school. Schulyer-Potts suddenly warms to the charms of the Clampetts, even if it means accepting Jethro as a fifth grader.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Servants" - Ellie May starts wearing dresses but takes it as an insult when someone says she looks like a city girl. Mr. Drysdale talks Jed into taking in his butler and upstairs girl in a plan to civilize the Clampetts, but they don't quite understand the idea of servants. Miss Hathaway takes Jethro bowling and begins to show an interest in him.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Race for Queen" - Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Lafe Lingers On" - Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Girl From Home" - A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Nebraskan
programme.desc: An ex-Army scout seeks to protect a loyal Native-American aide accused of murdering a Sioux tribal chief.

programme.title: Edge Of Eternity
programme.desc: A trio of mysterious murders lead a sheriff and his girlfriend into the middle of a gold smuggling operation.

programme.title: Apache Territory
programme.desc: A drifter takes on marauding Apaches in order to save a group of besieged settlers.

programme.title: Fighting Caravans
programme.desc: Clint Belmet (Gary Cooper) is a frontier scout with his hands full in this 1931 Paramount Pictures version of Zane Grey's novel. He's helping guide a wagon train across the country, fighting off various attacks on the way, and falling for his lovely Felice (Lily Damita). Belmet's grizzled companions think he should leave the woman alone, but it gets lonely out on the trail, and Felice's charms are hard to resist. Featuring such notable character actors of the period as Ernest Torrence, Tully Marshall, and Fred Kolher, this vintage Hollywood Western still packs a wallop!

programme.title: Land of Hunted Men
programme.desc: A band of outlaws is terrorizing a town in the West. Leave it to Ray Crash Corrigan and his Range Busters to ride in and save the day. This film marked the return of Corrigan to the famous series; he had appeared in the first sixteen movies but left for a brief hiatus following 1942's ARIZONA STAGECOACH. This was the 21st of 24 movies in the Range Busters series. Produced between 1940-1943, the Range Busters were a huge financial success for Monogram Pictures.

programme.title: Painted Desert
programme.desc: A mightly melodrama of red-blooded action, William Boyd stars in the Pre-Code western talkie - The Painted Desert (1931). The first sound film for Hollywood heavyweight Clark Gable, The Painted Desert finds Boyd and Gable at odds over the affections of a cowboy's beautiful daughter (Helen Twelvetrees).

programme.title: Fugitive of the Plains
programme.desc: In this continuation of the much loved Billy the Kid serials featuring dreamboat Buster Crabbe (perhaps best known for his numerous appearances as Flash Gordon in the 30s and 40s), Billy finds himself joining an outlaw band led by women in order to, once again, clear his name after being wrongly accused of a crime he did not commit. Helmed by famed B-movie director Sam Newfield, this film also features Al St. John, whose lovable Fuzzy character was as essential to the PRC's Billy the Kid series as Billy himself.

programme.title: Revenge of the Virgins (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The angry and topless female members of a Native American prepare for battle when white treasure hunters move in on their sacred ground. Peter Perry Jr. (The Secret Sex Lives of Romeo and Juliet) directed this early nudie-cutie from a script by legendary cult filmmaker Ed Wood (Plan Nine from Outer Space). Writing under the pen name Peter LaRoche, Wood churned out this screenplay just before he reinvented himself as the author of seedy adult novels.

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west meet their match in this B-Western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Rex Bell, billed on the old print ads as The heroic idol of young America! stars as Breezy Kildare, a New York detective who happens to be in Wyoming. When Breezy leads a group of cattleman against the well-armed city boys, the bad guys will wish theyd stayed in New York! The rest of the cast includes such favorites from the period as George Gabby Hayes, Roy DArcy, and Marceline Day. (Day worked opposite everyone from John Wayne to Buster Keaton, but retired from acting shortly after this movie at age 25.) Directed by Harry L. Fraser.

programme.title: Raiders of the Border
programme.desc: U.S. Marshal Nevada Jack McKenzie (Johnny Mack Brown) and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) go undercover to catch jewelry smugglers in this vintage western from Monogram Pictures. This was one of the last films directed by John P. McCarthy (Song of the Gringo, The Oklahoma Cyclone), while Johnny Mack Brown would go on to find great success as Nevada Jack; this was the fourth of 19 films where he played the crime busting marshal.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown

programme.title: Grind

programme.title: Breakfast Of Champions
programme.desc: A satire on American consumerism.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon kicks off a new era of Simply Symons from Venice, California, joined by Liz Symon and Olivia “Liv” Annacone Cisic for a laid-back backyard cookout centered around the ultimate burger debate: smash burgers versus classic pub burgers. Michael walks through the techniques behind each style, from selecting the ideal fat ratio for ground beef to achieving the perfect crust on a hot grill and cast iron griddle. Along the way, the trio shares stories about old Symon’s Dinners episodes, Liv’s transition into motherhood, and the realities of filming outdoors with planes overhead, lawn equipment buzzing nearby, and neighborhood life unfolding around them. As Michael builds both burgers with grilled onions, pickles, secret sauce, and different cheeses, the conversation turns into a humorous discussion about condiments, cooking preferences, smash burger myths, and burger nostalgia. Liz keeps the energy going with playful jabs at Michael while also preparing his favorite cocktail, the bourbon-based Paper Plane, complete with Aperol, Amaro, and fresh lemon juice. The episode wraps with a tasting session comparing both burgers side-by-side, with everyone weighing in on which version wins the battle. Between the casual banter, cooking tips, and family-style atmosphere, the episode delivers an easygoing and highly approachable backyard burger feast.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Memorial Day-themed episode of Simply Symons, Michael Symon cooks outdoors with his wife Liz and co-host Olivia Annacone Cisic, preparing grilled shrimp skewers with a honey-soy-orange glaze, a pineapple salsa, and a coconut rice pilaf, while Liz mixes up a frothy pineapple daiquiri with an egg-white twist. The episode opens with playful banter about Olivia's discovery of gray hairs at 33, her upcoming bachelorette party plans, and Michael's gentle ribbing of the trio's early-dinner, early-bedtime lifestyle. Michael walks through his Memorial Day menu, highlighting a coconut rice made with jasmine rice, coconut milk, and a coconut curry lime bone broth from friend Marco Canora's brand Brodo, plus a bright pineapple salsa built with cilantro, scallion, red pepper, jalapeño, honey, and a dashi soy sauce sourced from Santa Monica's McCall's butcher. A lively debate breaks out over rice ratios and rinsing technique, with Liz advocating for a 1:1¾ ratio while Michael sticks to his two-to-one method, and Olivia sharing that she recently cooked jasmine rice for her unwell dog Zeke. Throughout the cooking session, mishaps and humor keep things lively — limes refuse to juice, Liz nearly topples the dashi bottle, and Michael accidentally steps on their dog Min. Discussions range from shrimp varieties and sizing (the U-number system), to the fruity heat of jalapeños and habaneros, to favorite hot sauces including Crystal and the Florida datil-pepper-based Zabs. Liz's honest palate becomes a recurring theme, with Michael crediting her direct, critical feedback as a key ingredient in his culinary success over the years. Liz dry-shakes her egg-white pineapple daiquiri before adding ice for a frothy finish, then adjusts the balance mid-tasting by swirling in extra pineapple juice. The shrimp grill up with beautiful caramelization from the honey glaze, and the coconut rice is finished simply with cilantro and cracked black pepper. During the final tasting, Olivia — a self-described texture-averse pasta lover — bravely tries the shrimp, endorsing the flavors while admitting she prefers the coconut rice. Michael closes the episode wishing viewers a happy Memorial Day and reminding them to keep things simple and delicious.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon grills a spatchcock chicken with avgolemono sauce in his Venice Beach front yard, joined by his wife Liz and co-host Liv. The episode features a lavender lemon drop martini and explores grill techniques for perfectly crispy, juicy poultry.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this Simply Symons episode, hosts Michael and Liz Symon, alongside Liv Annacone, prepare a summer-inspired dish featuring seared halloumi cheese topped with warm strawberries, fresh mint, pistachios, and a red wine vinaigrette infused with honey and cracked black pepper. Liz creates a homemade strawberry simple syrup using fresh and frozen strawberries, which becomes the base for a refreshing strawberry vodka martini garnished with mint. The hosts discuss the unique properties of halloumi—a Cypriot cheese that doesn't melt and develops a savory crust when seared—and explore the classic pairing of sweet and salty flavors. They also share storage tips for fresh herbs and berries, mention the superior quality of local Harry's berries, and discuss favorite summer TV shows.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: In this episode of Simply Symons, hosts Michael Symon and Liz Symon, joined by Liv Annacone, bring the show indoors to cook during warm weather. Michael creates an elevated crab grilled cheese sandwich using mascarpone, jumbo lump crab meat, Old Bay seasoning, tarragon mustard, and pickled red onions, with parmigiano-reggiano crust for extra crispness. Meanwhile, Liz prepares an orange whip cocktail with a modern twist, substituting tangerine juice for traditional orange juice and combining vodka, rum, Grand Marnier, and heavy cream. The episode showcases kitchen techniques like gentle folding to preserve crab lumps and discusses alternative grilled cheese fillings, while celebrating nostalgic Cleveland dining memories and mall culture.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: On Father's Day, Michael Symon prepares his ideal meal featuring a dry-aged prime ribeye steak seasoned with beef tallow, kosher salt, and pepper, grilled to a perfect char. He creates a vibrant salsa verde with anchovies, capers, fresh herbs (tarragon, parsley, mint), and red wine vinegar to complement the rich beef. Liz Symon crafts an equal-parts cocktail combining bourbon, amaro, and blood orange juice with cold brew coffee, garnished with a blood orange peel and crunchy salt. Michael also grills bitter endive with olive oil and finishes plates with orange segments. Throughout, the hosts discuss beef tallow versus olive oil, charcoal selection, proper salt techniques, and how the steak's varying fat content creates different doneness levels across a single cut.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: For the Fourth of July, Michael Symon showcases his approach to smoked ribs, starting with a custom cherry BBQ sauce made from cherry juice, sherry vinegar, molasses, bourbon, cold brew coffee, and warm spices. He explains his smoking technique at 300-325°F for two and a half hours, finishing the ribs on the grill for char and caramelization. Meanwhile, Liz Symon prepares a tart cherry Negroni—an equal-parts cocktail featuring gin, Campari, sweet vermouth, tart cherry juice, and a splash of seltzer. The episode balances savory and sweet as the hosts discuss rib texture preferences, ideal side dishes, and the versatility of the cherry sauce.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: Michael Symon, Liz Symon, and Liv Annacone welcome their Venice neighbor Rose Previte, chef and owner of the acclaimed Michelin-starred restaurant Maidan, to craft beef souvlaki kebabs with grilled pita and tzatziki. Rose shares her culinary journey and the spices that define Middle Eastern and Greek kebab traditions—from sumac and fresh mint to warming spices like cinnamon and Syrian seven-spice blend. The episode also features a wine pairing with rare Georgian amber wines from two female winemakers, including the endangered Del Shavi grape variety. Throughout, the hosts discuss Rose's innovative Maidan Market concept in Los Angeles and their shared Midwestern roots.

programme.title: Simply Symons
programme.desc: On Simply Symons, Michael Symon, his wife Liz, and Liv Annacone cook Big Rigs rigatoni with spicy Italian sausage and vodka sauce in their front yard. Michael demonstrates his "cheater sauce" approach using pre-seasoned sausage, tomato paste, cream, and vodka that comes together in under 30 minutes without needing a knife. The hosts discuss pasta cooking techniques, the importance of finishing pasta in sauce rather than plating separately, proper seasoning of pasta water, and using quality ingredients like whole Parmigiano-Reggiano. They pair the dish with Lambrusco, an Italian sparkling red wine, exploring its versatility with various cuisines and its ability to cut through rich, spicy flavors.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: On Father's Day, Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly are joined by social media cooking sensation Ereka Vetrini to create quick, delicious dishes perfect for summer entertaining. Vetrini, who built a massive following on TikTok and Instagram during the pandemic, shares her approach to accessible Italian-inspired cooking. The episode features two recipes: roasted red pepper bruschetta with Calabrian chili mayo and a perfectly seared 20-minute tuna steak topped with a caper-shallot relish. Between cooking segments, the hosts discuss parenting, picky eaters, navigating social media criticism, and the importance of real food over processed trends. Vetrini shares her philosophy that cooking at home is about making people feel loved and special.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: In this Father's Day-themed episode of Chewed Up Show, Michael Symon takes the lead in the kitchen preparing grilled pork chops finished with a homemade cherry-bourbon gastrique—a classic French-Italian sweet and sour sauce. Guest host Ereka Vetrini joins returning host Clinton Kelly as they discuss family dining traditions, Michael's father's grilling mishaps, and the importance of proper meat preparation. The episode covers essential cooking tips including salting meat in advance, resting temperatures, and the balance of fat and acid in great sauces. The team also demonstrates the Tumbler knife sharpener and discusses Italian-American family customs around entertaining and basement kitchens.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly welcome culinary producer Allison Cancro as a guest co-host while Carla Hall is performing her one-woman show. The team creates an affordable sausage and peppers dish with corn and tomato salad, keeping the total cost under $25 for four people. Allison shares her Jersey Italian heritage and family food traditions, while the hosts discuss farmer's markets, fresh produce, and regional ingredients. A video segment features Carla Hall preparing bone-in pork chops with smashed sweet potatoes. The episode concludes with a Price Is Right-style pricing game featuring grocery items.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: The hosts welcome Jules Esposito, director of food and beverage operations for the Charlie Palmer Collective and Appalachian Hotels, to celebrate summer entertaining. Jules shares her Stone Fruit Panzanella recipe—a bread salad featuring stone fruits, tomatoes, fresh herbs, and a white balsamic vinaigrette that's ideal for casual gatherings. The episode explores Jules's journey from event planning in Paris to her current role overseeing operations for Charlie Palmer's restaurant empire, plus spirited discussions about seasonal eating, herb gardens, pizza regionalism, and the art of hosting.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Kat Hong & John Hong" - Dave turns the tables on Kat and John, as he cooks a special meal for the married couple behind the sensational LA-based restaurant Yangban Society.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: It's a steaming hot day, but Dave makes a celebratory dish of tteok mandu guk, a Korean rice cake and dumpling soup for his guest, singer and actor Eric Nam. They discuss being Korean American today and how much has changed since they were young, what it is like to be Korean American in Korea, and, of course, Eric's recent stint on Traitors. Dave and Eric talk about their favorite Korean foods, how great banchan is, and why kimbap and hoe might be taking off in the future.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: Bryan Ford, Recipe Club legend and baker, makes this recipe from Ottolenghi for pancakes with maple brown butter apples and sesame praline.

programme.title: Recipe Club Recipes
programme.desc: From Scott Clark of Dad's Luncheonette (and former chef de cuisine of the three-Michelin-star Saison in San Francisco), a homemade Oreo that we can actually get behind. Generally we stand opposed to trying to recreate perfect foods like ketchup or Oreos. We thought this was gonna be a moon pie masquerading as an Oreo. But no, this rules. Crispy, crunchy, addictively satisfying.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live is back! Dave starts by making an iconic DTL dessert, then is joined by Culinary Producers Andrew Miller and Marc Johnson for a Pre-Opening Diaries to talk about the process and behind-the-scenes of Dinner Time Live. Dave ends with a quick and delicious corn soup.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave opens the episode by shucking oysters and making a specialty: kimchi consommé (2:07)! He then talks about his recent trip to Europe, eating his way through Copenhagen and Bath with his family (22:42). Copenhagen and its food scenes have matured a lot; maybe so has Dave. He finishes with a MOIF on the important things: Batman, airplane food, and samples.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: On today's episode, Dave makes gazpacho fresh (1:01) and from (relatively) frozen (8:20) for special guest Goodboy Noah, known for his catchy recipe songs, hilarious online content, and his best pal Cheetah. During the interview (42:48), learn how a musical career was shaped into an internet cooking career, have a ton of laughs, and discover which of Goodboy Noah and Cheetah is Simon and which is Garfunkel.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave makes a boiled chicken, one of his favorite ways to prepare a delicious meal (2:37). While it boils, he recaps episode 1 of the new season of Netflix's Dinner Time Live with David Chang, the sandwich episode with Joe Manganiello and Joel Kim Booster (7:01). Dave answers an Ask Dave about pop-up restaurants (43:33), and finishes it off by taking his versatile boiled chicken international (48:44).

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara's in Barcelona to sip gin and tonics in the shadow of the iconic Sagreda Familia, then joins a food writer to make classic Iberico Pork with Romanesco sauce and Gambas Ajillo. At home, Sara whips up Fideo - Barcelona's take on Paella made with noodles instead of rice.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Fish is on the menu when Sara joins Greek Chef Maria Loi harborside near Athens to cook lemony, crispy skinned Branzino along with Beet, Beans and Feta Salad and Lemon Potatoes. Then it's off to Athen's Central Market to buy Retsina at a famous tavern for a rooftop mezze party in the shadow of the Acropolis. Back at home, Sara uses canned sardines for a quick and easy pantry taco.

programme.title: Sara's Weeknight Meals
programme.desc: Sara kicks off with a street food tour in Rome led by American Ex Pat Katie Parla. Then, they perform a Roman hat trick – three pastas starting with the same delicious base: Gricia made with guanciale transforms into Amatriciana by adding tomatoes or Carbonara by adding eggs. In her own kitchen, Sara makes baked penne with prosciutto and Fontina cheese.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to Enniskillen to meet Pat O’Doherty and his famous pigs. Paul is given a master class in butchery and then travels by boat to see the world famous ‘black bacon’ pigs run wild on their very own private island!

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to the mighty Thomond Park to cook on the pitch of Munster RFC and meets world rugby legend Doug Howlett. Then it’s off to the stunning Adare Village where Paul meets up with his old pal Wade Murphy of 1826 Restaurant.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to the stunning coastal town of Ballycastle in County Antrim, where he visits the beautifully located Ballycastle farmers market and then cooks a fantastic scallop dish on board one of the local boats.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to the breath taking Dursey Island in Cork, home of Irelands only cable car, to learn how to cook fresh scones and jam. After, he cooks up an amazing lobster dish with the Wild Atlantic Way as his backdrop!

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to meet master smoker Paul Curry, later cooking a great dish while gaining exclusive access to one of Irelands most stunning private castles. Then its off to Corick House Hotel & Spa for a spot of foraging and more great recipes!

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to Long Meadow Cider company to see how father and son team Pat & Peter make their incredible cider. Then we step back in time to see how the Celts cooked over 2,000 years ago in The Navan Centre in County Armagh.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to Killarney and cooks a healthy dish on a jaunting car whilst being whisked through the stunning national Park. Then hikes up Cardiac Hill before having a pint in The Killarney Brewing Company.

programme.title: Treyvaud Travels
programme.desc: Treyvaud travels to Quinns pub in Dungannon to look back at his entire series. We get to see hilarious unseen footage, bloopers and some of Treyvaud’s most favorite moments of his amazing travels.

programme.desc: Needles are found on one woman while a stun gun is discovered on another. A DUI test stirs up bad memories for a man driving while intoxicated, and a convicted murderer becomes violent.

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Counting and Numbers

programme.title: The Super Simple Show - Space & Planets
programme.desc: This compilation is about Space & Planets! Includes children's songs "Mr. Golden Sun", “Skidamarink” & "More!

programme.title: Driving In My Car - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Drive a car, ride a bike, row a boat, ride on a train, and fly an airplane with this playful and super fun song for kids; “Driving In My Car”! Driving in my car. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very fast. Vroom vroom vroom. Driving very slow. Vroom vroom vroom. I like driving. Driving in my car.

programme.title: See You Later Alligator - Super Simple Puppets - Kids Songs - Super Simple
programme.desc: It’s time to go! Here’s a video featuring the Super Simple Puppets for our popular goodbye song, See You Later, Alligator. This is a fun song to sing at the end of a class, party, or play-date!

programme.title: Five Little Chicks - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Five Little Chicks is great for nap time and for practicing counting down from five. Try singing along when it’s time for a nap.

programme.title: Rosey & The Rowdy Rustlers Tour Bus - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers are coming to town to kick off their concert tour! But while driving out on the open road, a giant stray tumbleweed gets in the path of their tour bus, making a mighty mess! Rosey, Roxie, and Rude Jenny will have to take a detour to Carl’s Car Wash! With a quick mess assessment, Carl’s suds-sational car wash is ready to give Rosey and The Rowdy Rustlers’ vehicle a good scrub-a-dub! The band leaves as happy customers, and just in time for the concert!

programme.title: Who Took The Cookie? (Finny the Shark) - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Finny’s friends are playing a game of Who Took The Cookie From The Cookie Jar. Who do you think took the cookie? The seahorse, the starfish, the octopus, the walrus, the dolphin, or the crab? Let’s play and find out!

programme.title: Moolissa The Underwater Cow - Finny The Shark and more
programme.desc: Finny’s class finds out they have a new special friend coming for a visit, a cow named Moolisa! Being from land, it can be tricky for Moolisa to do everything that Finny’s friends do in the sea, but Moolisa will try her best to share in all the experiences of life in the ocean.

programme.title: Twinkle Twinkle Little Star - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: “Twinkle, twinkle little star. How I wonder what you are?” Lulu the Owl and Juno the Star become fast friends in this Super Simple version of one of the world’s most popular nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Enjoy the best of summer, autumn and winter with Baby Einstein! Discover the familiar sights and sounds of the different seasons. Learn names of common objects associated with each through repetition and narration and see engaging images of whimsical toys that celebrate each. Discover the magic of each season from falling leaves, rolling beach balls and even snowmen.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet Cats, Dogs, Birds, Bugs and Woodland Creatures! Learn simple words through narration and repetition. Meet all sorts of creatures from domestic kittens to jungle cats, puppies, big and small birds, butterflies, lady bugs, otters and deer!! See whimsical toys and puppets.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating creatures from across the globe and learn to run, hop, and crawl like your favorite animal friends. Dance and sing along to discover animal names and the native habitats of the world's most unique creatures. See real-life images of lions and zebras on the African savannah, then learn animal names through repetition and narration, or simply watch your favorite animals play!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Meet fascinating animals from across the globe! Dance and sing along with puppets and discover some of the world's most unique creatures. Join us to dance along to classical melodies as we learn animal names through narration and repetition or simply enjoy seeing live-action footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: With the Dolittle, and other Baby programs under their belts, the tots who follow Julie Aigner-Clark's Baby Einstein series will sidle up to Baby Newton expecting a similar exploration of building blocks to brilliance, but this time there's a wrinkle or two. Animation makes its first appearance, and parents steeped in keep-it-simple culture may object to the springy "I Know My Shapes" song, a departure from classical-only video predecessors.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Hop aboard to see vehicles that travel by land, water and sky! See real-life images of cars, boats and planes in this on-the-go adventure that features cameos from some of your favorite Baby Einstein characters, all while listening to music from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Luke and Lily Baby Shark - Shark Song For Kids
programme.desc: Kids! We've taken your favorite songs like Baby Shark, The Muffin Man, Little Bo Peep and put them in a compilation for several minutes of pure, uninterrupted fun learning and singing with Luke and Lily.

programme.title: Daddy's Red Car + Fun Nursery Rhymes for Kindergarten
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join Super Supremes as they sing and dance in this fun kids video. programme.desc: Robotnik announces that he will marry Queen Aleena in a plot to become the king of Mobius.

programme.desc: Bob and the gang have got a big job on - repairing some pipework in Farmer Pickles field. / Bob, Scoop & Muck have to make repairs to a tunnel. When they arrive on site, Bob sends Muck ahead into the tunnel with a load of bricks.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and The Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's underground air base in a mission to reprogram the launch data on Robotnik's fleet of Stealth-Bot aircraft. While attempting to reprogram the Stealth-Bot computer system.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: During a mission to one of Robotnik's factories, Sally is taken prisoner by Robotnik and Snively, who construct a roboti-sized "Sally" clone, complete with Sally's personality, and mannerisms. The double tricks Sonic into rescuing "Sally".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and the Freedom Fighters journey to Robotnik's lab in hopes of deciphering his roboti-sizer system. While underground, Sonic spots his now roboti-sized Uncle Chuck aboard a Badlands bound mine-train and devises a plan for his rescue.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sally, Rotor, Bunnie and Antoine take off in a homemade airplane, bound for an ancient city hidden deep in the Great Mountains, while Sonic follows via his favorite transportation, his sneakers.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: While on a mission to the big city to replace Nicole's malfunctioning microchip, Sonic and Sally encounter the Guardian, a mysterious cloaked figure who guards a dormant wizard named Lazar and his computer of evil spells.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic is hired into an obvious trap when a frustrated Robotnik decides to appeal to the Hedgehog's ego and announces a "race to determine the fastest on Mobius".

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic conquers Robotnik's latest evil - a vehicle designated to locate and destroy living tissue matter - during a solo mission to the Badlands. Upon Sonic's return, the Freedom Fighters honor him with a victory party.

programme.title: Sonic Underground
programme.desc: Sonia discovers that the watch she received from her friend is actually a monitoring device for the Robotnik Intelligence Agency.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling. Gina, Ellie, and Thunderbell went camping in Rainbow Forest but they saw a monster in the forest, got scared and had to run away. // Ruby is struggling to make a doll with her dad. Ruby and Choco get their suitcase and as Ruby swings her umbrella, there they are, in front of Rainbow fountain. Mayor Ling Ling tells her that today is the day of Princess Kiki's ballet performance.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ruby is looking at shoes that are now too small for her but she is unwilling to throw away. Ling Ling is worried about Thunderbell. His scooter broke so he is not able to carry out his work as a mail carrier. // Gina calls Rainbow Ruby because today is the day to show their appreciation to Mayor Ling Ling. It took a long time for the village friends to prepare an amazing painting for the mayor. Unfortunately, Thunderbell accidentally destroyed the painting while delivering it.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: There is a new menu at the restaurant, which is very popular. There is a long line in front of the restaurant but there weren't enough staff members to serve the villagers the food. Rainbow Ruby turns into a waitress using her magic suitcase and serve tables kindly. // Rainbow Village is full of marbles. The marbles that Rainbow Ruby spilled in her room poured down into the village from up above the sky! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a paramedic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina, Thunderbell, and Choco try to cheer Jessy up but their efforts are of no use. While talking to Mayor Ling Ling, Rainbow Ruby realizes that today is the day that Jessy first arrived in Rainbow Village! Jessy was upset that her friends forgot such a meaningful day to her. // Ling Ling has caught a bad cold and was sneezing all over the place. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a doctor and cares for him.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried about the play planned for tonight. There are no costumes ready for the villagers so it's hard to figure out which roles they're playing. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a costume designer and designs costumes for her friends. // It is very windy in Rainbow village and Paige, a paper doll, is flying to wherever the wind takes her. She is so light that she is blown away by the wind. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a fire fighter and rescue Paige.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is worried that the villagers are all in low spirits. Ruby thinks of fun games to play but the villagers say that they have already played all of the games too many times. Rainbow Ruby transforms into a singer. // Ling Ling is worried because of the "Secret Present Swapping Party" that Thunderbell is preparing. Thunderbell forgot to send out the invitations. Rainbow Ruby turns into a mail carrier and delivers the invitations.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. Thunderbell, Ellie, and Gina are trying to pick them up and clear the field but it is not easy since the pokey pods are so spikey. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that he lost his glasses. Then Ellie tells her she lost her needles, Gina her hat, and Thunderbell his wheels. Who could have taken away all these things?

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling is waiting for Rainbow Ruby, looking worried. It turns out that Mr. Sloth's best friend Chirpee is depressed. Chirpee wants to fly high but is struggling due to his small wings and lack of means to learn how to fly. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that the dress that the paper doll Paige was planning to wear to Kiki's dance party is torn. Paige very much wants to go to the party but she cannot go without a dress.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. Ling Ling is very sad that Ellie decided not to participate. Ellie is not a confident dancer so she doesn't want to participate. // Rainbow Ruby's friends tell her that they are now friends with Felicia. They were playing hide and seek but Felicia is such a good hider that she's refused to come out even though she's won the game.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Kiki wants to become a movie actress but the villagers have no idea how to direct a movie. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a movie director. She then assigns roles to the village friends. // Ling Ling rushes toward Rainbow Ruby to tell her that a busy villager mom asked him to take care of her three children but he just doesn't have time to look after them. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When a comedy of errors causes Orange, Plum and Cherry to arrive late to their campout, they start off their annual tradition of telling tall-tales around the campfire.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple isn't paying attention when Strawberry describes their campout tradition of telling "Tall Tales." So Apple tells her thrilling adventure of a wild road rally she entered, only to surprise the girls by proving the story is actually true.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City. When Strawberry's stuffed-up nose makes her bake a bad-tasting cake, Apple, afraid the truth will hurt Strawberry's reputation, proclaims it's delicious. The fib snowballs when the Queen of Berryvania reads Apple's review and orders Strawberry's new cake for her ball.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berrykin Bloom's braggart cousin, Berrykin Bertram, has won the hot sauce competition at the local county fair year after year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When Apple feels left out of a Berryball game and an advanced ballet class, she invents some "groove booties" programmed to dance to any beat. She temporarily impresses her friends with her dance moves, but when the groove booties go out of control and threaten the town's Berryball game, she is forced to fess up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the girls discover that Apple's groove booties can teach the pups to dance, Plum gets an idea for a Doggie Dance Show. Wanting to impress them, Huck offers to have TomTom join the show... despite the pup's obvious dislike of performing in public. It's up to Strawberry to help Huck see that he should not force TomTom into something he just doesn't want to do.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry and Orange are dangling their legs in the stream when something tickles Orange's foot. She is sent squealing from the water, certain an eel is after her. Strawberry good-naturedly chuckles at her antics. But Orange gets her dander up and wades into the water to face her "attacker." When she looks down into the water, gazing up at her is the cutest, most adorable, puffy-cheeked fish she's ever seen. It's love at first sight. Orange has to take him home.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: At the next Storytime, Strawberry is going to read a new poem. We see her at the podium as she finishes writing it, one afternoon when no one else is in the café except Custard and Pupcake. Strawberry clears her throat and reads the poem aloud. It's a simple, sweet rhyme about the magic of making wishes on falling stars. She tries a few different rhymes as she goes, noting them on her paper. She is startled to hear applause from Mr. Longface Caterpillar who has heard her recital.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: From the BerryWorks to Strawberry's Café, everyone is excited about who will win this year's Spring Flower Festival! Berry Bitty City is decorated with colorful banners proclaiming the big event. Lemon works the hardest. For weeks she has watered her violets by day and sung to them at night, doing everything she can to win first prize. With the contest just a day away, Lemon is at her garden early.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Blueberry ordered some Zippy Gro daisy seeds and planted them in her garden. She is surprised that they've sprouted in less than a day despite their descriptive moniker. Strawberry comes by to admire them and Blueberry is reminded that the new cookbook Strawberry ordered has arrived. Strawberry is excited to try out the new corn muffin recipe, as its level of difficulty will be a challenge for her. Strawberry follows the muffin recipe, mixes the ingredients, and double checks it.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.title: Behind the Wings
programme.desc: A continued exploration of the Artemis missions, building on Episode 404 of Behind the Wings. Look back at Apollo to understand what we learned from going to the moon for the first time. Follow the progress of the program, from the development of new lunar architecture to the training of the astronauts who will take the next steps on the moon. In a Virtual Reality lab at Lockheed Martin Space, Engineers discuss the design of the Orion spacecraft. At Kennedy Space Center, technicians reflect on the learnings from Artemis I. At NASA's Johnson Space Center, astronauts are training for Artemis II, the first Artemis crewed mission. Meet the diverse team working on the program and discover how returning to the Moon is a crucial step towards new scientific discoveries, a cis-lunar economy, and inspiring the next generation of explorers.

programme.title: Corpsman! Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Harry Chandler arrived at Pearl Harbor in September 1941, serving as a United States Navy Corpsman. He believed his time in Hawaii would be paradise, a stark contrast to the cold winters of New England. However, on December 7, 1941, Harry's world was shaken by the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and the island of Oahu. On that Day of Infamy, his duty became saving lives and retrieving charred bodies from the harbor's waters. Corpsman! Pearl Harbor, narrated by sports commentator Jim Nantz, follows Harry's story on that day and the days that followed America's sudden entry into World War II, while also examining the role of corpsmen and medics during the war.

programme.title: Peleliu: WWII's Most Well-Preserved Battlefield
programme.desc: Narrated by actor Kyle Chandler (Friday Night Lights, Bloodline), Peleliu: WWII’s Most Well-Preserved Battlefield explores the impact that World War II had on a small island in the Palau archipelago in Micronesia. The remote island of Peleliu is considered the most well-preserved battlefield in the world — a living testament to one of the U.S. Marines' most bitter and eye-opening fights in World War II. The military engagement was supposed to last three days, but, instead, it took 72 days of hard fighting to eliminate the Japanese from 500 caves on the island.Because it is illegal to remove any relic from the island, the battlefield remains almost as it was when the fight here ended in the fall of 1944.

programme.title: The American Saint Nick
programme.desc: The American Saint Nick tells the true story of a handful of GI's who brought Christmas back to a freshly liberated small Luxembourg town caught up in WWII.

programme.title: Corpsman! Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Harry Chandler arrived at Pearl Harbor in September 1941, serving as a United States Navy Corpsman. He believed his time in Hawaii would be paradise, a stark contrast to the cold winters of New England. However, on December 7, 1941, Harry's world was shaken by the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor and the island of Oahu. On that Day of Infamy, his duty became saving lives and retrieving charred bodies from the harbor's waters. Corpsman! Pearl Harbor, narrated by sports commentator Jim Nantz, follows Harry's story on that day and the days that followed America's sudden entry into World War II, while also examining the role of corpsmen and medics during the war.

programme.title: America's Secret War
programme.desc: While the United States was publicly engaged in the Vietnam War, a secret military operation under the command of the CIA was being waged in the neighboring nation of Laos. At a concealed airbase in the heart of the country, the CIA trained an army of allied guerilla fighters to destroy enemy supply lines. AMERICA'S SECRET WAR uncovers the history of this covert mission.

programme.title: Bob Dole, Italy and World War 2
programme.desc: Some of the most brutal, merciless and chaotic fighting of World War II took part in the mountains of Italy and lasted until the final days of the war. Even as the Allies advanced into the heart of Berlin in May of 1945, the battle for Italy continued. Many soldiers were affected by their time fighting in Italy and the horrific conditions they faced there. BOB DOLE, ITALY AND WORLD WAR II is about those who lived through one of World War IIs most desperate fights, including the young lieutenant from Kansas whose unforgettable ordeal in Italy would shape his life of public service.
